### Instruction:

### Input:
An all-in-one Sales Performance Management solution that enhances sales team effectiveness through data-driven insights, goal setting, and performance monitoring. The system must integrate with external services such as CRM platforms, sales enablement tools, and analytics software. SalesOptimizer should provide secure authentication through OAuth2 and SAML. Implement caching mechanisms, like Memcached, for quick access to frequently used data and improved performance.

[{"title": "Sales Performance Management Solution", "body": "### Objective
Implement an all-in-one Sales Performance Management solution that enhances sales team effectiveness through data-driven insights, goal setting, and performance monitoring.

### Description
The solution must integrate with external services such as CRM platforms, sales enablement tools, and analytics software. It should provide secure authentication through OAuth2 and SAML.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement data models for sales performance metrics and goal setting
- [ ] Integrate with CRM platforms and sales enablement tools using APIs
- [ ] Implement caching mechanisms (e.g., Memcached) for quick access to frequently used data and improved performance
- [ ] Develop secure authentication using OAuth2 and SAML
- [ ] Conduct performance and stress testing for scalability and reliability", "labels": ["backend", "api", "architecture", "infrastructure"]}, {"title": "Goal Setting and Performance Monitoring", "body": "### Objective
Implement goal setting and performance monitoring features within the Sales Performance Management solution.

### Description
This feature should allow sales teams to set and track goals, with real-time monitoring and feedback. It should also provide analytics and insights to help teams optimize their performance.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement goal setting and performance monitoring workflows
- [ ] Develop dashboards and analytics for real-time monitoring and feedback
- [ ] Integrate with data models for sales performance metrics
- [ ] Conduct user acceptance testing for goal setting and performance monitoring features", "labels": ["frontend", "backend", "api", "testing"]}, {"title": "Integration with CRM Platforms", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the Sales Performance Management solution with CRM platforms and sales enablement tools.

### Description
This integration should enable seamless data exchange and synchronization between the solution and CRM platforms.

### Tasks

- [ ] Design and implement API integrations with CRM platforms
- [ ] Conduct testing and validation for data exchange and synchronization", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}, {"title": "Caching Mechanisms", "body": "### Objective
Implement caching mechanisms to improve performance and reduce latency in the Sales Performance Management solution.

### Description
This feature should use a caching layer (e.g., Memcached) to store frequently accessed data and reduce the load on databases.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select caching mechanism (e.g., Memcached)
- [ ] Design and implement caching layer for frequently accessed data
- [ ] Conduct performance and stress testing for caching mechanisms", "labels": ["backend", "infrastructure", "performance"]}]
